mapper.sql: work_order_id, order_no, tenant_id, title, description, source, space_scope, status, reporter_account_id, reporter_uid, reporter_user_id, room_id, building_id, location_text, need_manual_location, location_locked, assigned_user_id, assignee_role_key, assignee_dept_id, category, risk_level, survey_summary, plan_budget, public_ceiling_price, fund_source, fund_gate_blocked, satisfaction_score, satisfaction_comment, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
WITH space AS ( SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, building_id, room_id FROM c_owner_property WHERE account_status = 1 AND building_id IS NOT NULL AND room_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, building_id, room_id FROM c_property_roster WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND building_id IS NOT NULL AND room_id IS NOT NULL ) SELECT s.tenant_id, COALESCE(MAX(pr.community_name), MAX(tc.tenant_name), CONCAT('小区 ', s.tenant_id::TEXT)) AS community_name, s.building_id, COALESCE(MAX(pr.building_name), CONCAT(s.building_id::TEXT, ' 号楼')) AS building_name, COALESCE(MAX(pr.unit_name), '默认单元') AS unit_name, s.room_id, COALESCE(MAX(pr.room_name), CONCAT(s.room_id::TEXT, ' 室')) AS room_name FROM space s LEFT JOIN c_property_roster pr ON pr.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND pr.room_id = s.room_id AND pr.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN t_tenant_community tc ON tc.tenant_id = s.tenant_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND s.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
AND
(s.tenant_id = #{bs.tenantId} AND s.building_id = #{bs.buildingId})
AND 1 = 0
GROUP BY s.tenant_id, s.building_id, s.room_id ORDER BY community_name, s.building_id, unit_name, room_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_work_order ( tenant_id, title, description, source, space_scope, status, reporter_account_id, reporter_uid, reporter_user_id, room_id, building_id, location_text, need_manual_location, location_locked, assigned_user_id, assignee_role_key, assignee_dept_id, category, risk_level, survey_summary, plan_budget, public_ceiling_price, fund_source, fund_gate_blocked, satisfaction_score, satisfaction_comment, version ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{source}, #{spaceScope}, #{status}, #{reporterAccountId}, #{reporterUid}, #{reporterUserId}, #{roomId}, #{buildingId}, #{locationText}, #{needManualLocation}, #{locationLocked}, #{assignedUserId}, #{assigneeRoleKey}, #{assigneeDeptId}, #{category}, #{riskLevel}, #{surveySummary}, #{planBudget}, #{publicCeilingPrice}, #{fundSource}, #{fundGateBlocked}, #{satisfactionScore}, #{satisfactionComment}, #{version} )

sql.if: AND ( wo.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR wo.order_no ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR wo.location_text ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT wo. FROM t_repair_work_order wo WHERE ORDER BY wo.create_time DESC, wo.work_order_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_repair_work_order wo WHERE

SELECT wo.* FROM t_repair_work_order wo JOIN t_repair_quote_invitation invitation ON invitation.work_order_id = wo.work_order_id AND invitation.tenant_id = wo.tenant_id WHERE invitation.supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND invitation.status IN ('PENDING', 'SUBMITTED') ORDER BY invitation.sent_at DESC, wo.work_order_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_work_order SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, room_id = #{roomId}, building_id = #{buildingId}, location_text = #{locationText}, need_manual_location = #{needManualLocation}, location_locked = #{locationLocked}, assigned_user_id = #{assignedUserId}, assignee_role_key = #{assigneeRoleKey}, assignee_dept_id = #{assigneeDeptId}, category = #{category}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, survey_summary = #{surveySummary}, plan_budget = #{planBudget}, public_ceiling_price = #{publicCeilingPrice}, fund_source = #{fundSource}, fund_gate_blocked = #{fundGateBlocked}, satisfaction_score = #{satisfactionScore}, satisfaction_comment = #{satisfactionComment}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_supplier_quote ( work_order_id, tenant_id, supplier_name, quote_amount, quote_summary, attachment_id, attachment_hash, submitted_by_user_id, submitted_by_role_key, submitted_by_supplier, supplier_confirmed, supplier_dept_id, quote_invitation_id, submission_source, confirmation_status, original_source, original_attachment_hash ) VALUES ( #{workOrderId}, #{tenantId}, #{supplierName}, #{quoteAmount}, #{quoteSummary}, #{attachmentId}, #{attachmentHash}, #{submittedByUserId}, #{submittedByRoleKey}, #{submittedBySupplier}, #{supplierConfirmed}, #{supplierDeptId}, #{quoteInvitationId}, #{submissionSource}, #{confirmationStatus}, #{originalSource}, #{originalAttachmentHash} )
mapper.select: SELECT quote_id, work_order_id, tenant_id, supplier_name, quote_amount, quote_summary, attachment_id, attachment_hash, submitted_by_user_id, submitted_by_role_key, submitted_by_supplier, supplier_confirmed, supplier_dept_id, quote_invitation_id, submission_source, confirmation_status, original_source, original_attachment_hash, create_time FROM t_repair_supplier_quote WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY quote_amount ASC, quote_id ASC

SELECT invitation.quote_invitation_id, invitation.work_order_id, invitation.supplier_dept_id, supplier.legal_name AS supplier_name, invitation.status, invitation.deadline, invitation.sent_at FROM t_repair_quote_invitation invitation JOIN t_supplier_org_profile supplier ON supplier.supplier_dept_id = invitation.supplier_dept_id WHERE invitation.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND invitation.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND invitation.status <> 'CANCELLED' ORDER BY invitation.sent_at, invitation.quote_invitation_id
SELECT legal_name FROM t_supplier_org_profile WHERE supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND verification_status IN ('PENDING_VERIFICATION', 'VERIFIED')
mapper.sql: p.supplier_dept_id, p.unified_social_credit_code, p.legal_name, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.verification_status, CASE WHEN account.active_account_count > 0 THEN 'ACTIVATED' WHEN invitation.invitation_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'PENDING_ACTIVATION' WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM(p.contact_name), '') IS NULL OR NULLIF(BTRIM(p.contact_phone), '') IS NULL THEN 'CONTACT_MISSING' ELSE 'NOT_INVITED' END AS account_status, COALESCE(account.active_account_count, 0) AS active_account_count, account.login_phone, invitation.invitation_id AS activation_invitation_id, invitation.expires_at AS activation_invitation_expires_at

LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id)::INT AS active_account_count, (ARRAY_AGG(a.phone ORDER BY (a.phone = p.contact_phone) DESC, u.user_id))[1] AS login_phone FROM sys_user u JOIN t_account a ON a.account_id = u.account_id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_role role ON role.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE u.dept_id = p.supplier_dept_id AND u.status = '0' AND a.status = 1 AND role.status = '0' AND role.role_key IN ('SERVICE_PROVIDER_MANAGER', 'SERVICE_PROVIDER_STAFF') ) account ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT i.invitation_id, i.expires_at FROM t_supplier_activation_invitation i WHERE i.supplier_dept_id = p.supplier_dept_id AND i.status = 'PENDING' AND i.expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY i.create_time DESC, i.invitation_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) invitation ON TRUE
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM t_supplier_org_profile p JOIN t_supplier_tenant_relation r ON r.supplier_dept_id = p.supplier_dept_id
WHERE r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND r.status <> 'DISABLED' AND p.verification_status <> 'DISABLED' ORDER BY p.legal_name, p.supplier_dept_id

SELECT r.relation_id, r.supplier_dept_id, p.legal_name AS supplier_legal_name, r.service_category, r.valid_from, r.valid_until FROM t_supplier_tenant_relation r JOIN t_supplier_org_profile p ON p.supplier_dept_id = r.supplier_dept_id WHERE r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND r.relation_type = 'FRAMEWORK' AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.verification_status = 'VERIFIED' AND (r.valid_from IS NULL OR r.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE) AND (r.valid_until IS NULL OR r.valid_until >= CURRENT_DATE) AND (r.service_category IS NULL OR r.service_category = #{serviceCategory}) ORDER BY p.legal_name, r.relation_id

SELECT p.supplier_dept_id FROM t_supplier_org_profile p JOIN t_supplier_tenant_relation r ON r.supplier_dept_id = p.supplier_dept_id WHERE r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND r.status <> 'DISABLED' AND p.unified_social_credit_code IS NULL AND LOWER(BTRIM(p.legal_name)) = LOWER(BTRIM(#{legalName})) ORDER BY p.supplier_dept_id LIMIT 1
SELECT nextval(pg_get_serial_sequence('sys_dept', 'dept_id'))
mapper.update: UPDATE t_supplier_org_profile SET unified_social_credit_code = COALESCE(unified_social_credit_code, #{unifiedSocialCreditCode}), contact_name = COALESCE(contact_name, #{contactName}), contact_phone = COALESCE(contact_phone, #{contactPhone}), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM t_supplier_org_profile p JOIN t_supplier_tenant_relation r ON r.supplier_dept_id = p.supplier_dept_id
WHERE r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND p.supplier_dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND r.status <> 'DISABLED' AND p.verification_status <> 'DISABLED'
mapper.sql: i.invitation_id, i.tenant_id, i.supplier_dept_id, i.work_order_id, p.legal_name AS supplier_legal_name, i.contact_name, i.contact_phone, i.default_role_key, i.status, i.expires_at, i.activated_account_id, i.activated_user_id, i.invited_by_user_id, i.activated_at, i.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_supplier_activation_invitation i JOIN t_supplier_org_profile p ON p.supplier_dept_id = i.supplier_dept_id WHERE i.invitation_id = #{invitationId} FOR UPDATE OF i

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_account a JOIN sys_user u ON u.account_id = a.account_id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE a.phone = #{contactPhone} AND a.status = 1 AND u.dept_id = #{supplierDeptId} AND u.status = '0' AND r.role_key IN ('SERVICE_PROVIDER_MANAGER', 'SERVICE_PROVIDER_STAFF') AND r.status = '0' )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_supplier_activation_invitation SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE invitation_id = #{invitationId} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE t_supplier_activation_invitation SET status = 'ACTIVATED', activated_account_id = #{accountId}, activated_user_id = #{userId}, activated_at = #{activatedAt} WHERE invitation_id = #{invitationId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_quote_invitation ( work_order_id, tenant_id, supplier_dept_id, invited_by_user_id, deadline, status ) VALUES ( #{workOrderId}, #{tenantId}, #{supplierDeptId}, #{invitedByUserId}, #{deadline}, 'PENDING' ) ON CONFLICT (work_order_id, supplier_dept_id) DO UPDATE SET deadline = EXCLUDED.deadline, status = CASE WHEN t_repair_quote_invitation.status IN ('DECLINED', 'EXPIRED', 'CANCELLED') THEN 'PENDING' ELSE t_repair_quote_invitation.status END, sent_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT decision_id, work_order_id, tenant_id, building_id, scope_type, unit_name, scope_label, total_owner_count, total_area, participated_owner_count, participated_area, agree_owner_count, agree_area, disagree_owner_count, disagree_area, abstain_owner_count, abstain_area, invalid_owner_count, invalid_area, evidence_attachment_hash, printed_and_attached, result, create_time, update_time FROM t_repair_local_decision WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_local_decision SET participated_owner_count = #{participatedOwnerCount}, participated_area = #{participatedArea}, agree_owner_count = #{agreeOwnerCount}, agree_area = #{agreeArea}, disagree_owner_count = #{disagreeOwnerCount}, disagree_area = #{disagreeArea}, abstain_owner_count = #{abstainOwnerCount}, abstain_area = #{abstainArea}, invalid_owner_count = #{invalidOwnerCount}, invalid_area = #{invalidArea}, evidence_attachment_hash = #{evidenceAttachmentHash}, printed_and_attached = #{printedAndAttached}, result = #{result}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE decision_id = #{decisionId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT package_id FROM t_repair_approval_package WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'APPROVED') ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT reviewed_amount FROM t_repair_price_review WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND conclusion = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY create_time DESC, price_review_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT position FROM t_committee_member_position WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY CASE position WHEN 'DIRECTOR' THEN 1 WHEN 'VICE_DIRECTOR' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_supplier_quote quote SET confirmation_status = 'CONTRACT_CONFIRMED', supplier_confirmed = 1 FROM t_repair_supplier_recommendation recommendation WHERE recommendation.quote_id = quote.quote_id AND recommendation.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND recommendation.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND quote.confirmation_status = 'PENDING_SUPPLIER_CONFIRMATION'

UPDATE t_repair_contract SET status = 'EFFECTIVE', contract_file_hash = #{finalContractFileHash}, effective_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} AND status = 'SIGNING'
mapper.select: SELECT contract.contract_amount - COALESCE(SUM(request.requested_amount), 0) FROM t_repair_contract contract LEFT JOIN t_repair_payment_request request ON request.contract_id = contract.contract_id AND request.status NOT IN ('RETURNED', 'FAILED') WHERE contract.contract_id = #{contractId} GROUP BY contract.contract_amount

WITH owner_latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (room_id) participant_type, room_id, conclusion FROM t_repair_acceptance_record WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND participant_type = 'AFFECTED_OWNER' ORDER BY room_id, submitted_at DESC, acceptance_record_id DESC ), witness_latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (participant_type) participant_type, room_id, conclusion FROM t_repair_acceptance_record WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND participant_type <> 'AFFECTED_OWNER' ORDER BY participant_type, submitted_at DESC, acceptance_record_id DESC ), latest AS ( SELECT * FROM owner_latest UNION ALL SELECT * FROM witness_latest ), affected AS ( SELECT room_id FROM t_repair_acceptance_scope WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1)::INT FROM affected) AS affected_room_count, (SELECT COUNT(1)::INT FROM affected room WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM latest record WHERE record.participant_type = 'AFFECTED_OWNER' AND record.room_id = room.room_id AND record.conclusion IN ('PASSED', 'AUTHORIZED') )) AS passed_affected_room_count, (SELECT COUNT(1)::INT FROM latest WHERE conclusion = 'RECTIFICATION_REQUIRED') AS rectification_count, (SELECT COUNT(1)::INT FROM latest WHERE participant_type = 'AFFECTED_OWNER' AND conclusion = 'UNREACHABLE') AS unreachable_count, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM latest WHERE participant_type = 'OWNER_REPRESENTATIVE' AND conclusion = 'PASSED' ) AS owner_representative_passed, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM latest WHERE participant_type = 'PROPERTY_REPRESENTATIVE' AND conclusion = 'PASSED' ) AS property_representative_passed
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_work_order_event ( work_order_id, tenant_id, action, from_status, to_status, actor_account_id, actor_identity_type, actor_identity_id, remark, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{workOrderId}, #{tenantId}, #{action}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actorAccountId}, #{actorIdentityType}, #{actorIdentityId}, #{remark}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSONB) )
mapper.select: SELECT event_id, work_order_id, tenant_id, action, from_status, to_status, actor_account_id, actor_identity_type, actor_identity_id, remark, payload_json::text AS payload_json, create_time FROM t_repair_work_order_event WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, event_id ASC
